title: comfy workflow *
description: Output shape for workflow editing commands (slots, set-slot, vary).

item_map.description: compose: foreach item -> provenance map. Mirrors the `_meta.items` block embedded in each written workflow (`_meta.schema == "compose/1"`).

nodes.description: node ids this item's branch produced (numerically sorted, includes the save node)

save_node.description: auto-appended save node id, null when the branch is terminal
